summary: tool/execution.ts is dead code — publishStarted/publishCompleted/publishFailed never imported
detail: tool/execution.ts exports 3 functions (publishStarted, publishCompleted, publishFailed) that publish CoordEvents.SubagentPhaseChanged to the Bus. Zero imports anywhere in the codebase. This was likely a precursor to tool execution telemetry that was never wired in. The file should be either wired into the tool pipeline or removed. If telemetry is added in tool/tool.ts:wrap(), this file could serve as the bus-publishing layer (rather than direct filesystem writes).
